title: sophora unifoliata
intro: Sophora unifoliata, also known as the one-leafed sophora or Chinese milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Sophora unifoliata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Sophora unifoliata often involve the use of its roots or flowers, which can be dried and made into teas, capsules, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
